creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 197987
svn diff

Maintainer Update

* update from 3.7.3 to 3.7.4
* delete 'BROKEN_powerpc64', fix bug #232046
* delete PATCH_SITES and PATCHFILES, the port is sync with github release
* add 'do-install', to prevent cmake to install some docs (managed by post-install-DOCS-on)

this port depends on duktape-lib, this update is an implicit dump too.

Testing:
portlint -C : OK
port test   : OK

Please commit it

Alfonso
